hypothesis: Incorporating metal-center electronic descriptors derived from GFN1-xTB single-point calculations—specifically local d-orbital population and atomic spin magnetic moment for the metal atoms—into the ∆-learning XGBoost model will reduce the HSE06 band gap prediction MAE for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 30% relative to the current ∆-learning model that uses only structural descriptors.
